rationale: Both correctly identify the duplicate-of-#4808 disposition, but X hedges appropriately on the one point it couldn't verify (whether #4808 actually merged to main) and flags a specific, internally-consistent gap (the _STALE_API_FILES regression list plausibly missing the diffusion file, consistent with the issue's own framing that #4810 'missed' this site). Y instead confidently asserts the fix is already merged and fully tested ('9 tests should pass') with no real evidence, directly contradicting X's finding and risking a confidently-wrong reassurance to the reporter — especially suspicious since the terse ground-truth comment points to further discussion rather than a simple 'already fixed, closing.'
